title: HTTP Services, Clients, Boundaries, Security, and Graceful Shutdown · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A small service accepts hostile input, calls a slow dependency, serves concurrent requests, and must shut down without losing work. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a resilient secure HTTP service design after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design Handler and ServeMux boundaries, method and path semantics, request limits, response status, headers, and streaming order.
Reuse configured clients and transports, set request contexts and timeouts, close bodies, bound reads, and classify status separately from transport errors.
Validate untrusted input, escape output for its sink, minimize authority and data, protect secrets, and set explicit server resource limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Graceful Shutdown Readiness
steps.instruction:
review case — Service request 2 has a hostile label, oversized body, slow dependency, duplicate header, and client cancellation during shutdown. Bound resources, validate and encode by sink, preserve stable responses, and drain owned work without leaking internals. Competency probe: Coordinate signal handling, readiness withdrawal, server shutdown, in-flight deadlines, background-worker completion, and forced-exit evidence.

Inspect the Graceful Shutdown Readiness trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Graceful Shutdown Readiness.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for coordinate signal handling, readiness withdrawal, server shutdown, in-flight deadlines, background-worker completion, and forced-exit evidence. For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Graceful Shutdown Readiness, keep Graceful Shutdown Readiness connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
